patch.value: Promote plan workflow primitives to the public SDK: plan create/steps/dependencies/decisions/discoveries/validation/materialization

pm plan implements durable agent planning workflows (Codex/Claude/Cursor-style: steps with status transitions, dependencies, decisions, discoveries, validation results, materialization into tracked items) but its orchestration lives CLI-side and is not covered by any existing promotion item. SDK-first plus the universal-tool story (pm-w89s) require plan primitives to be public typed API so agent harnesses, MCP pm_plan, and custom tools consume the same engine. Duplicate check: pm-v7dj (closed original plan feature), pm-z5nb (open Plan item about the schema epic, unrelated); no open SDK-promotion overlap.

SDK exports typed plan primitives covering the full pm plan surface (create with stepTitle, step lifecycle, dependencies, decisions, discoveries, validation, materialize) with identical governance and history semantics; CLI and MCP plan surfaces consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change (plan specs green).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation slicing 2026-07-10 (grounded in current src state). Already public — do NOT redo: the pm_plan MCP surface and generic plan action dispatch; profile *planning* (planProfileApplication from core/profile/profile-plan.ts) is a different domain and already exported. The actual gap: the ENTIRE plan workflow lives in src/cli/commands/plan.ts (1,796 lines) — there is no src/core/plan module at all, making this the largest single-module promotion left in the epic besides test.ts. Plan is also the agent-harness surface (Codex/Claude/Cursor-style planning), so primitive-level promotion is what makes SDK-embedded planning harnesses possible without shelling out. Suggested slices: S1 plan document model + step lifecycle primitives (~90m) — create with stepTitle, step transitions, plan read model. S2 plan annotation primitives (~60m) — dependencies/decisions/discoveries; shapes should mirror the pm-zwpp S1 annotation kernel — coordinate so plan does not grow a second annotation engine. S3 validation + materialization primitives (~60m) — materialize creates real items and MUST consume the shipped lifecycle primitives (pm-98cz) rather than private paths; this is the primitive-level fix site for pm-qd2h / GH-452 (materialize dead-ends on required-on-create custom fields) and pm-ypha / GH-453 (materialize --json omits title/type/parent) — coordinate with both, do not duplicate their fixes. S4 typed PmClient facades + SDK reference docs/tests (~30m), result shapes matching runAction oracle. Order: strictly S1 -> S2 -> S3 -> S4 (each layer consumes the previous one).

author: maintainer-agent
message: link S3 fix-sites pm-qd2h/pm-ypha + S2 annotation-kernel sibling pm-zwpp
